name: PlateIntersectsWithIntersectionLineException
summary: The PlateIntersectsWithIntersectionLineException class represents an error when, plate polygon extends beyond intersection line.

constructors.name: PlateIntersectsWithIntersectionLineException
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the PlateIntersectsWithIntersectionLineException class with "Plate polygon extends beyond intersection line" error message.
